heroDescription.processed: Lakeview Community College offers over 85 degree and certificate programs designed to launch your career or transfer to a four-year university. With small class sizes, dedicated faculty, and tuition that is a fraction of university costs, LCC is the smart choice for your education.

ctaDescription.processed: Whether you are a recent high school graduate, a working adult looking to advance your career, or returning to education after time away, Lakeview Community College has a path for you. Apply in minutes with our streamlined online application.
